message:
test(fuzz): SessionDirection::as_u8 + SessionKeys::mac_key dispatch (b8x87)

Add fuzz_session_direction_dispatch target covering SessionDirection
byte mapping (I2R=0x00, R2I=0x01) and SessionKeys::mac_key direction
dispatch. Properties: as_u8 byte values, mac_key returns the matching
buffer, byte-distinctness when input fields differ. Once-gated anchor
verifies the exact byte mapping and dispatch on a known SessionKeys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
